x-enumDescriptions.CREATED: a newly created prospect that has not yet been verified

x-enumDescriptions.VERIFIED: a prospect that has been verified, e.g. the full name was collected, email address was validated, the prospect clicked on a verification link in an email, etc.

x-enumDescriptions.ADMITTED: a prospect that has been converted into a customer

x-enumDescriptions.WITHDRAWN: a prospect that is no longer interested in becoming a customer
